name: cowork-dev
description: Authoring kit for Claude Cowork plugins, current as of June 2026. Owns the Cowork-specific half of plugin development: the four install paths (Anthropic catalog, direct ZIP upload, marketplace by URL, org private marketplaces) with their real limits (200 MB / 5,000 files per plugin, 50 MB manual ZIP, npm/pip marketplace sources unsupported, reserved-name list), component support (skills surface in Cowork + Claude chat; hooks and sub-agents run only in Cowork; connectors via Anthropic's cloud — local stdio MCP is NOT supported), org distribution states (Required / Installed by default / Available / Not available), and chat-native design patterns (multilingual skill triggers, connector-aware enrichment, privacy posture for cloud Routines, refuse-without-prerequisites, save-and-resume). Ships a deterministic lane: validate-cowork-artifact.sh checks a Cowork-bound plugin package for name/reserved-name violations, package-size and file-count limits, npm/pip marketplace sources, and stdio MCP servers, on the shared JSON finding contract.
